case_title: TSANG, LILY vs. FLEMING, ERIC ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT FLEMING, ERIC ROBERT DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-31-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-26-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-13-1998

OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY RICHTER W KONG, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-04-1999 CONTINUED FROM JAN-20-1999 TO MAR-03-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-03-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ENTIRE ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 525. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY RICHTER W KONG. HEARING SET FOR APR-28-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-28-1999, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL 4-26-99
